name: title_card
description: Game-name display lettering: the words "Wool Crush" in exactly that spelling, chunky rounded letters that look hand-knitted from yarn with visible stitch texture, warm cream-and-orange yarn colors on transparent background, a small yarn ball dotting the i or tucked at the baseline. No other text.
prompt_extra: gently arched baseline; thick friendly letterforms with darker-gold outline and glossy bevel; composition sized for a wide home-screen banner

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
